subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath reached the presence of the Wronged One, and from it We have inhaled the fragrance of thy sincerity unto God, the Lord of what hath been and what shall be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و وجدنا منه عرف خلوصک لله رب ما کان و ما یکون
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action
